targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('minute', timestamp) AS time, sensor_type, count(*) AS value FROM sensor_readings WHERE timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '6 hours' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1
SELECT timestamp AS time, temperature_c AS value FROM sensor_readings WHERE sensor_type = 'noaa_weather' AND timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '6 hours' ORDER BY time
SELECT NOW() AS time, kp_index AS value FROM sensor_readings WHERE sensor_type = 'noaa_space' AND kp_index IS NOT NULL ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT NOW() AS time, humidity_pct AS value FROM sensor_readings WHERE sensor_type = 'noaa_weather' AND humidity_pct IS NOT NULL ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT timestamp AS time, frequency_mhz::text AS metric, power_dbm AS value FROM sensor_readings WHERE sensor_type IN ('rf','adsb') AND timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' ORDER BY time
SELECT created_at, event_type, payload, chain_hash FROM audit_log ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100
SELECT payload->>'task_type' AS metric, count(*) AS value FROM audit_log WHERE event_type = 'ai_router' GROUP BY 1
SELECT timestamp AS time, solar_flux AS value FROM sensor_readings WHERE sensor_type = 'noaa_space' AND sensor_id = 'noaa_solar_wind' AND timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '6 hours' ORDER BY time
